The '''Wroona Stardock''' was a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Type IV-A Stardock]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]].

==Description==
The facility was large enough for one [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] analog or several smaller [[Capital ship/Legends|capital]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. The station had the capacity to host many crew and technicians, but only 50 were permanently stationed there. When more were required, they were shuttled up from the surface of the planet, where many smaller repair jobs were also carried out.<ref name="Strike" />

==History==
The Wroona Stardock was built by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Wroona during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].<ref name="Strike" /> In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], members of the disbanded [[Guild of Armament Distributors]] [[Raid on the Wroona Stardock|raided]] the Stardock and damaged the Imperial [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Rampant]]''.<ref name="GNN9" /> The Wroona Stardock gained its independence after the [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] revolt shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. After this, it was run by the [[Wroonian Guilds]] and leased out as a repair facility to anyone with enough [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Strike" />

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the [[Vengeance (Golthan)|''Vengeance'']], a Star Destroyer commanded by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Bregius Golthan]], docked there for repairs after suffering heavy damage from [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces. While docked, the mercenaries [[Dirk Harkness]] and [[Jai Raventhorn]] infiltrated and scuttled the ship.<ref name="Strike" />
